suggestions.title: Reduce link density above the fold
suggestions.description: There are many links in the top portion of the page. Group related actions into concise clusters so the primary narrative and CTA are easier to scan, especially on mobile.

suggestions.title: Consider grouping or summarizing lower-page sections
suggestions.description: The homepage contains a large number of sections and headings. Consider turning some repeated patterns into carousels, tabs, or collapsible sections so decision-makers can scan the page more comfortably.
